channel.title: Creators Cooldown
channel.description: Host Jeff Pelletier speaks to some of the top creators of running related content, from filmmakers and photographers, to writers and podcast hosts.
channel.author: Jeff Pelletier
channel.itunes:author: Jeff Pelletier
channel.itunes:summary: Host Jeff Pelletier speaks to some of the top creators of running related content, from filmmakers and photographers, to writers and podcast hosts.

item.title: Making Videos for David Roche, with Cody Bare
item.description:
Cody Bare is the filmmaker behind the videos on David Roche’s YouTube channel, including the Road to Western States series, and the Leadville and Javelina films.In this conversation, we go deep on what they learned along the way, including:

  • Why athlete-owned channels outperform brand channels
  • How brands can invest in content without controlling it
  • What it actually looks like to build a YouTube series from scratch, while learning filmmaking in real time.

FOLLOW ME HERE:

  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/
  • Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns
  • Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942

Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/
item.dc:creator: Jeff Pelletier
item.itunes:summary:
Cody Bare is the filmmaker behind the videos on David Roche’s YouTube channel, including the Road to Western States series, and the Leadville and Javelina films.In this conversation, we go deep on what they learned along the way, including:

  • Why athlete-owned channels outperform brand channels
  • How brands can invest in content without controlling it
  • What it actually looks like to build a YouTube series from scratch, while learning filmmaking in real time.

FOLLOW ME HERE:

  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/
  • Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns
  • Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942

Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Creating for the Long Run, with Floris Gierman
item.description:
Floris Gierman is an entrepreneur and co-founder of Path Projects. He's also a prolific content creator and educator with a YouTube channel, podcast, coaching platform, and now a book.

In this episode of Creators Cooldown, we tackle tough topics like how to keep creating long-term without burning out, and how one's relationship with their work can change over time.

Get Floris' book Running Breakthroughs on Amazon: https://geni.us/aD0aBYQ

Check out @florisgierman on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@florisgierman

FOLLOW ME HERE:

  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/
  • Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns
  • Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942

Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/
item.dc:creator: Jeff Pelletier
item.itunes:summary:

In this episode of Creators Cooldown, we tackle tough topics like how to keep creating long-term without burning out, and how one's relationship with their work can change over time.

Get Floris' book Running Breakthroughs on Amazon: https://geni.us/aD0aBYQ

  • Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942

Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Science Meets Storytelling, with Göran Winblad
item.description:
Göran Winblad is a Swedish ultrarunner and YouTuber. His videos are creative and cinematic, yet always educational and grounded in the science of running.We talk about how he approaches content as a solo creator, how he balances training with life as a father of two living in Norway, and how he juggles work and creative projects. We also got into the challenges of building an audience on YouTube as a non-native English speaker, and how he thinks about authenticity in a world of brand deals and algorithms.


Check out Göran channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@goranwinblad

FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

We also got into the challenges of building an audience on YouTube as a non-native English speaker, and how he thinks about authenticity in a world of brand deals and algorithms.


Check out Göran channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@goranwinblad

item.title: Capturing Ultramarathons Authentically, with Simon Guérard
item.description:
Simon Guerard races a lot and he documents it all from a first perspective on his growing youtube channel "Ultra Marathon Trail Running with Simon".In this conversation, you'll hear his origin story on YouTube, as well as about how he balances filming and editing with his training and racing, not to mention his busy work schedule.


Check out Simon's channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@runningwithsimon


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/
item.dc:creator: Jeff Pelletier
item.itunes:summary:
Simon Guerard races a lot and he documents it all from a first perspective on his growing youtube channel "Ultra Marathon Trail Running with Simon".In this conversation, you'll hear his origin story on YouTube, as well as about how he balances filming and editing with his training and racing, not to mention his busy work schedule.


Check out Simon's channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@runningwithsimon


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Running 250 Miles on Camera, with Wes Plate
item.description:
Wes Plate has carved out a niche documenting some of the longest footraces. He's taken on nearly every 200+ mile race in North America, he's a 5 time Cocodona 250 finisher, and like me he films the experience from a first-person perspective.


We talk about what it takes to capture these massive efforts, how his background as a professional video editor shapes his approach, and the ways in which trying to document these long races affects his experience in doing them.


Check out Wes' work on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@wplate


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

We talk about what it takes to capture these massive efforts, how his background as a professional video editor shapes his approach, and the ways in which trying to document these long races affects his experience in doing them.

item.title: From FKT's to Podcasting, with Jeff Garmire
item.description:
Jeff Garmire has numerous FKT's to his name, including the Arizona Trail, Colorado Trail, Wonderland Trail, John Muir Trail, and many more, and he's run the Cocodona 250 five times, where I paced him this year. Jeff's also an author and the host of the Free Outside podcast. We talk about the media circle that was this year's Cocodona 250, as well as some of the challenges of creating content as an athlete.

Check out the Free Outside Podcast: https://www.freeoutside.com/

Get Jeff's Book: https://geni.us/bYHF0g4


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Making of The Chase, with Dylan Harris
item.description:
Dylan Harris is the filmmaker behind The Chase, a documentary about the extremely competitive 2024 Cocodona 250. In this episode, we take a deep dive into how the film came together, and get Dylan’s take on the fast-growing world of trail running filmmaking.


Check out Dylan's other work on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Spiritofdylan


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Learning by Doing, with Freetrail's Ryan Thrower
item.description:
Ryan Thrower is relatively new to the world of content production, but in his short career has collaborated with filmmakers like Ethan Newberry and a ton of brands. And as one of the founders of Freetrail along with Dylan Bowman, he's now working with some of the biggest names in the sport.


Check out Freetrail on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Freetrail

FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss an episode: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Filming the Moab 240, with Derrick Lytle
item.description:
Filmmaker Derrick Lytle has worked with many of the top athletes and brands, and he was responsible for the cinematography on my film from the Moab 240 and more recently he helped me with my film from Softrock.


Follow Derrick on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/derricklytle


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Mastering Shoe Reviews, with Mike Ko aka Kofuzi
item.description:
Michael Ko, better known as Kofuzi, is one of the biggest names in running shoe reviews on YouTube. Mike and I talk about how he got started and about his approach to making his shoe reviews, including how he works with brands while balancing the need to remain unbiased.


Kofuzi on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@kofuzi


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Documenting Ultramarathons, with Drew B Darby
item.description:
Drew B Darby's work includes collaborations with Sally McRae on the films from her 200 milers, and more recently with Singletrack on The Finisher about Jasmin Paris and the Barkley Marathons.I sat down with Drew to hear about how he fell in to filming running-related content, how he works with brands and athletes, and some of the lessons he's learned about filming some of the most challenging races in the world.


Check out Drew's YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@drewbdarby

Watch the Finisher: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PgTEsybXw-4


FOLLOW ME HERE:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierruns

Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/
item.dc:creator: Jeff Pelletier

Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: From Corporate to Creative, with Hilary Yang
item.description:
Hilary Yang wears many hats within the world of trail running, including that of photographer, podcaster, and more recently, race director. But this wasn't always the case. Just a decade ago, she was on a very different path, building a career in the corporate world.

I sat down with Hilary to talk about what led her to make the leap from corporate to creative, how she’s carved out a unique space in the trail running community, and the evolution of her work as a content creator.

FOLLOW HILARY HERE:YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@HilaryAnnInstagram: https://www.instagram.com/thehilaryann/

FOLLOW ME HERE:Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierrunsStrava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942My Website: https://jeffpelletier.com
item.dc:creator: Jeff Pelletier
item.itunes:summary:
Hilary Yang wears many hats within the world of trail running, including that of photographer, podcaster, and more recently, race director. But this wasn't always the case. Just a decade ago, she was on a very different path, building a career in the corporate world.

I sat down with Hilary to talk about what led her to make the leap from corporate to creative, how she’s carved out a unique space in the trail running community, and the evolution of her work as a content creator.

FOLLOW HILARY HERE:YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@HilaryAnnInstagram: https://www.instagram.com/thehilaryann/

FOLLOW ME HERE:Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/jeffpelletierrunsStrava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/2513942My Website: https://jeffpelletier.com

item.title: Embracing the Haters, with Andy Glaze
item.description:
Andy Glaze has been running 100 miles each week for close to 5 years, while inspiring hundreds of thousands with his short form content. But with this growing audience comes some negativity. I sit down to chat with him about how he manages all of this feedback both good and bad, about his approach to content, and why he's chosen to remain sponsor free.


FOLLOW ANDY:

  • TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@glazerunsIG:
  • https://www.instagram.com/amglazeYouTube:
  • https://www.youtube.com/@glazeruns


FOLLOW ME:

  • YouTube: https://youtube.com/@JeffPelletier
  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: The Business of Podcasts, with Finn Melanson of Singletrack
item.description:
Finn Melanson hosts the popular Singletrack Podcast. We chat about everything from how he got started, to the business of podcasting, and the future of media in trail running.


FIND SINGLETRACK HERE:

  • https://open.spotify.com/show/7jAsWCRNSCU8nh81vrAaC2
  • https://podcasts.apple.com/ca/podcast/singletrack/id1572382413
  • https://www.youtube.com/@runsingletrack


FOLLOW ME HERE:

  • YouTube: https://youtube.com/@JeffPelletier
  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: The Business of Reviews, with Dave Dillon of Chase the Summit
item.description:
Dave Dillon is the creator behind the popular YouTube review-based channel Chase the Summit. We talk about everything from his approach to working with brands, to how he deals with negative comments, and his busy life as a father of four.


FOLLOW CHASE THE SUMMIT HERE:

  • https://www.youtube.com/chasethesummit
  • https://chasethesummit.com/


FOLLOW ME HERE:

  • YouTube: https://youtube.com/@JeffPelletier
  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/

item.title: Introducing the Creators Cooldown Podcast
item.description:
Creators Cooldown is an interview-based podcast where host Jeff Pelletier talks shop with the best creators in running related content, including filmmakers, podcasters, photographers, and more.


FOLLOW ME HERE:

  • YouTube: https://youtube.com/@JeffPelletier
  • Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jpelletier/


Sign up for my newsletter so you never miss a video: https://jeffpelletier.com/newsletter/
